pair_construction.pregame_selection: latest snapshot with gap >= 4h before game_time
pair_construction.definition_note: P2 reported 797 = games with >=1 pregame snapshot (not requiring closing). This run uses 220 = games with BOTH pregame (>=4h) AND closing (<=2h) snapshots.

line_aware_filter.filter_rule: Only rows with line_comparable=True (status=MATCHED) contribute to clean CLV

before_after_comparison.note: P24/old = index-based CLV on TSL WBC data; P25B/clean = line-aware CLV after construction fix
before_after_comparison.conclusion: Removing 236 LINE_SHIFT_UNCOMPARABLE rows reduced mean CLV from +0.36% to +0.08% and max from +107% to +81%. Both CI cross zero. Clean CLV remains INCONCLUSIVE — confirms old positive mean was driven by line-shift artifacts.

p2_797_discrepancy_note: P2 report counted 797 = games with >=1 snapshot fetched >=4h before game_time (pregame snapshot exists). P25B requires BOTH pregame (>=4h) AND closing (<=2h) snapshots for a valid CLV pair. Only 220 of 886 matches satisfy both conditions. 577 games lack a closing snapshot (no TSL crawl near game start).
remaining_blockers: INCONCLUSIVE: Bootstrap CI still crosses zero after construction fix. Model does not demonstrate consistent positive CLV.
MLB: pregame-safe games = 0. MLB CLV remains blocked.
Closing coverage gap: 577/886 matches lack a closing snapshot — TSL crawler needs to be scheduled near game start times.
Model quality: MLB Brier=0.2487 (near random), WBC sample too small (n=40) for reliable model-edge assessment.
Next step: Investigate whether WBC-specific model predictions can beat market closing odds on the 220 comparable pairs.
